message.content:
You are implementing Task 1: Rewrite cv.md for the website.

## Task Description

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/content/list/cv.md`

- [ ] **Step 1: Replace the entire file content** with exactly this markdown:

```markdown
### Andrii Popenko. Engineering Manager. Software Architect.

---

### Contact information

- **Location**: Barcelona, Spain
- **Email**: [aopopenko@gmail.com](mailto:aopopenko@gmail.com)
- **GitHub**: [github.com/4thwithme](https://github.com/4thwithme)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/andrii-popenko-3331b3193/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrii-popenko-3331b3193/)

---

### Summary

Engineering Manager and Software Architect with 9+ years of experience building high-scale e-commerce systems. Led a team of 8 engineers on a platform processing 12,000+ orders/day. Architected a recommendations engine serving 40M+ queries/month at 99.99% availability. Combines deep technical expertise (TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, ML) with proven leadership: hiring 20+ engineers, driving technical strategy, and delivering measurable business outcomes.

---

### Core Competencies

Engineering Leadership · Software Architecture · Technical Strategy & Roadmapping · High-Load Systems Design · E-commerce Platforms · ML / Recommendation Systems · Team Scaling & Hiring · Cross-functional Collaboration · Performance Engineering · Agile / Scrum · Code Review & Mentoring · Stakeholder Management

---

### Experience

- #### [01.2024 - present]: Engineering Manager at "**Aleph1**"

  **Location**: Barcelona, Spain

  - Led a team of 8 engineers delivering features on a high-volume e-commerce platform processing **12,000+ orders/day**
  - Architected a high-load recommendations service handling **40M+ queries/month** at **99.99% availability** with zero unplanned downtime
  - Designed and deployed 4 recommendation models: FBT, similar items, Fourier-based trend prediction, and occasion-based vector search — driving a **40% increase in recommendation-attributed purchases**
  - Built trending products model from scratch using Fourier transforms for time-series trend prediction across the full product catalog
  - Scaled engineering team: hired **20+ engineers**, conducted **200+ technical interviews**
  - Drove RFC process, architectural decisions, and cross-team technical strategy
  - Owned incident response for production issues within team's domain

- #### [06.2020 - 01.2024]: Senior Software Engineer at "**Aleph1**"

  **Location**: Barcelona, Spain

  - Contributed to e-commerce platform growth from early stage to current scale
  - Resolved complex reliability, resilience, and performance challenges
  - Designed and built the React design system and component library
  - Conducted code reviews and mentored junior engineers

- #### [05.2019 - 06.2020]: Software Engineer at "**Shwartzcode**"

  **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine

  - Built pixel-perfect, accessible web interfaces; improved backend service performance
  - Implemented design system and component library for a call-centre application

- #### [06.2018 - 05.2019]: Software Engineer at "**Hasky**"

  **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine

  - Developed and maintained web services using React and Node.js

- #### [01.2018 - 06.2018]: Software Engineer at "**Mamontova Studio**"

  **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine — Built client websites with WordPress and PHP

- #### [06.2016 - 01.2018]: Neutron Physics Engineer at "**SSTC NRS**"

  **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine — Calculations of neutron transients in the reactor core and spent nuclear fuel

- #### [09.2016 - 06.2019]: Senior Teacher of Robotics & Programming at "**Robocode**"

  **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine — Taught robotics and programming; led school curriculum as senior teacher

- #### [09.2019 - 11.2021]: Teacher of Programming at "**Main Academy**"

  **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine — Taught HTML, CSS, JS, React; prepared students for their first engineering roles

---

### Technical Skills

- **Primary**: TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, Python
- **ML / Data**: Recommendation systems, Fourier analysis, vector search, ElasticSearch
- **Architecture**: Microservices, high-load system design, REST, GraphQL, RabbitMQ, WebSockets
- **Infrastructure**: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, CircleCI
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, ElasticSearch, Neo4j, MySQL
- **Other**: Git, Kibana, Logstash, Webpack, Astro.js

---

### Education

**National Technical University of Ukraine "Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute"**

- [09.2016 - 06.2018]: Master of Nuclear Power Engineering
- [09.2012 - 06.2016]: Bachelor of Nuclear Power Engineering

---

### Languages

English (professional), Ukrainian (native)
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit**

```bash
git add src/content/list/cv.md
git commit -m "content: rewrite cv.md with ATS keywords and quantified achievements"
```

## Context

This is a personal CV site built with Astro 4. The content in `src/content/list/cv.md` is an Astro content collection entry that gets rendered by `src/pages/index.astro` via `src/layouts/PostDetails.astro`. The website uses a dark theme (AstroPaper) — we are NOT changing the visual theme, only the content.

The husky pre-commit hook runs prettier on staged files. This is expected and will run automatically on commit.

## Your Job

Write the file with exactly the markdown content above. Then commit. Do not run the dev server — just write and commit.

Work from: /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/cv-astro

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed
- Git commit SHA

As an engineering manager, in my work I focus on: the product quality and code (because I have high standard expectations from UX/UI), well-organized teamwork, healthy and friendly atmosphere in the team, and the result (result delivered on time). I'm an easily challenged person, the more difficult the task in front of me is, the more enthusiastically I tackle it. I like learning new technologies. Have deep expertise in front end development, back end, databases, UX/UI. 17 18 --- 19 20 ### Technologies 21 22 - **Front end**: HTML, CSS (SCSS), JS (Typescript), Three.js, Next.js, Astro.js, GrapthQL, React (+ other), canvas drawing, webgl, pixel perfect, React design systems, accessibility, creation component libraries, Wordpress. 23 - **Back end**: Node.js, Nest.js, Express, Bun.js, RabbitMQ, socket, Meteor, GrapthQL (Apollo). 24 - **Infrastructure**: CircleCI, Webpack, Kubernetes, Gulp, AWS, Docker, GH Actions, Chai, Mocha, Sinon. 25 - **Databases**: MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, ElasticSearch, Neo4j. 26 - **Other languages**: Fortran, Python, C++, PHP, Rust. 27 - **Other**: GIT, Kibana, Logstash, Postman, npm. 28 29 --- 30 31 ### Experience 32 33 - #### [01.2024 - present]: Engineering Manager at "**Aleph1**". 34 35 **Location**: Barcelona, Spain

Developing a call-center app. Implementing the design system and creating the component library. 47 48 - #### [09.2019 - 11.2021]: Teacher of programming at "**Main Academy**". 49 50 **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine
51 **Responsibilities**: Teaching programming languages, such as HTML, CSS, JS, React. Preparing students for the exams, and helping them to be ready for their first job. 52 53 - #### [06.2018 - 05.2019]. Software Engineer at "**Hasky**". 54 55 **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine
56 **Responsibilities**: Developing and maintaining websites and services with React, Node.js etc. 57 58 - #### [01.2018 - 06.2018]: Software Engineer at "**Mamontova studio**". 59 60 **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine
61 **Responsibilities**: Creating websites with Wordpress and PHP. 62 63 - #### [06.2016 - 01.2018]: Neutron physics engineer at "**SSTC NRS**". 64 65 **Location**: Kyiv, Ukraine

77 [09.2012 - 06.2016]: Bachelor of nuclear power engineering.
